job_description:
# Senior Data Quality Analyst
Company: Kani Solutions
Source: Dice
Employment type: Contract (W2)
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/3c81be77-9ff8-4b6f-95d6-6f543652ed7e

## Highlights
- Remote senior data quality analyst contract.
- Posted 7 days ago and updated 4 days ago.
- Focuses on data quality frameworks, rules, thresholds, profiling, root-cause analysis, governance, documentation, and SQL.
- Prefers cloud data quality tooling and AWS stack familiarity; strong general data quality fit, lighter direct healthcare alignment.
strengths: Strong overlap with SQL, data quality, profiling, governance, root-cause analysis, and documentation.
Resume supports validation frameworks and business-rule based quality checks.
Remote contract within the last 60 days.
gaps: AWS-specific data quality tooling is more advanced than the current resume support.
No direct domain signal; this is a function-first fit rather than an industry fit.
notes: Good non-healthcare miss under the new all-domain rule. Tailor toward SQL, validation frameworks, data profiling, issue remediation, and governance support. Do not overstate AWS Glue/Redshift depth.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Senior Data Quality Analyst | SQL | Data Validation | Governance Support

replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.
replacements.replace: Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across regulated and large-scale business environments. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Strong fit for roles requiring data profiling, validation frameworks, root-cause analysis, and governance-minded quality controls.

replacements.find: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage
replacements.replace: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage, data profiling
